reasoning: Addressing your primary limiter of poor lactate clearance is key to improving your performance on the Alpine Loop. This workout targets this limiter directly, building on your last ride by incorporating intervals designed to enhance lactate processing and aerobic capacity crucial for the long climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5min @ 242-256W, 5min @ 201-218W) to mimic sustained efforts and recovery phases essential for the Alpine Loop climb.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
